intent: Insert RFBINDKEY

intent: Insert UI Menu Item
sqlTemplate: insert into UI_MENU_ITEM values (UI_MENU_ITEM_SEQ.nextval, (select ui_menu_screen_id from UI_MENU_SCREEN where screen_id = p_screen_id and menu_id=p_menu_id), p_menu_id, p_is_display, p_display_text, p_link, p_link_type, p_locn_flag, (select (coalesce(max(item_seq_nbr), 0) + 1) from UI_MENU_ITEM where ui_menu_screen_id in (select ui_menu_screen_id from UI_MENU_SCREEN where screen_id = p_screen_id and menu_id=p_menu_id)), p_ui_menu_comp_id, p_is_more, p_ajax_action, p_ajax_rerender, p_ajax_oncomplete, p_rendered, p_image_url)

intent: Insert Custom View UIAttr

intent: Get high date
sqlTemplate: SELECT TO_DATE('12/31/9999', 'MM/DD/YYYY') FROM DUAL

intent: Get system date
sqlTemplate: SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) FROM DUAL

intent: Get system date and time
sqlTemplate: SELECT SYSDATE FROM DUAL

intent: Get system timestamp
sqlTemplate: SELECT LOCALTIMESTAMP FROM DUAL

intent: Convert day number to day name
sqlTemplate: SELECT (CASE i_num WHEN 1 THEN 'Sunday' WHEN 2 THEN 'Monday' WHEN 3 THEN 'Tuesday' WHEN 4 THEN 'Wednesday' WHEN 5 THEN 'Thursday' WHEN 6 THEN 'Friday' WHEN 7 THEN 'Saturday' END) FROM DUAL

intent: Convert minutes to DHM (days, hours, minutes)
sqlTemplate: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(i_mnts / minutes_per_day)) || ':' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(i_mnts / 60)) || ':' || TO_CHAR(MOD(i_mnts, 60)) FROM DUAL

intent: Convert minutes to HM (hours, minutes)
sqlTemplate: SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(i_mnts / 60)) || ':' || TO_CHAR(MOD(i_mnts, 60)) FROM DUAL

intent: Calculate time difference
sqlTemplate: SELECT (l_curr_dtm - i_old_dtm) * DECODE(i_tm_uom, 'day', 1, 'hour', 24, 'minute', 1440, 'second', 86400, 'week', (1 / 7), 'year', (1 / 365)) FROM DUAL

intent: Convert time difference to string
sqlTemplate: SELECT TO_CHAR(get_time_diff(i_old_dtm, i_curr_dtm, i_tm_uom), 'FM999G999G999G990D09') || ' ' || l_suffix FROM DUAL

intent: Truncate date
sqlTemplate: SELECT TRUNC(i_dtm) + TRUNC((i_dtm - TRUNC(i_dtm)) / l_factor, 0) * l_factor FROM DUAL

intent: Convert date to epoch
sqlTemplate: SELECT (i_dt - unix_epoch) * seconds_per_day FROM DUAL

intent: Convert epoch to date
sqlTemplate: SELECT i_epoch_num / (seconds_per_day) + unix_epoch FROM DUAL

intent: Analyze container_type trends by date and cntr_type

intent: Count items cycle counted in a time window
sqlTemplate: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.ITEM_ID) AS ITEM_COUNT, COUNT(*) AS TRAN_COUNT, MAX(t.TRAN_DATE) AS LAST_COUNT_TIME FROM {schema}.PIX_TRAN t WHERE t.TRAN_CODE = 'CC' AND t.TRAN_DATE >= {time_rhs}

intent: List items cycle counted with location and quantity
sqlTemplate: SELECT t.ITEM_ID, b.ITEM_NAME, l.LOCN_BRCD, t.QTY AS COUNTED_QTY, t.TRAN_DATE FROM {schema}.PIX_TRAN t JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = t.ITEM_ID JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR l ON l.LOCN_ID = t.LOCN_ID WHERE t.TRAN_CODE = 'CC' AND t.TRAN_DATE >= {time_rhs} ORDER BY t.TRAN_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Current on-hand inventory by location and item
sqlTemplate: SELECT l.LOCN_BRCD, b.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_ID, i.ON_HAND_QTY, i.ALLOCATABLE_QTY, i.TO_BE_FILLED_QTY FROM {schema}.WM_INVENTORY i JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = i.ITEM_ID JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR l ON l.LOCN_ID = i.LOCN_ID WHERE i.ON_HAND_QTY > 0 ORDER BY i.ON_HAND_QTY DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Count inventory adjustments in a time window
sqlTemplate: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ADJ_COUNT, SUM(t.QTY) AS TOTAL_ADJ_QTY, MAX(t.TRAN_DATE) AS LAST_ADJ_TIME FROM {schema}.PIX_TRAN t WHERE t.TRAN_CODE IN ('ADJA', 'ADJN', 'ADJ') AND t.TRAN_DATE >= {time_rhs}

intent: List inventory adjustments with item and location detail
sqlTemplate: SELECT t.ITEM_ID, b.ITEM_NAME, l.LOCN_BRCD, t.TRAN_CODE, t.QTY AS ADJ_QTY, t.TRAN_DATE FROM {schema}.PIX_TRAN t JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = t.ITEM_ID JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR l ON l.LOCN_ID = t.LOCN_ID WHERE t.TRAN_CODE IN ('ADJA', 'ADJN', 'ADJ') AND t.TRAN_DATE >= {time_rhs} ORDER BY t.TRAN_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Count active tasks by type and status
sqlTemplate: SELECT t.TASK_TYPE, t.STAT_CODE, COUNT(*) AS TASK_COUNT FROM {schema}.TASK t WHERE t.STAT_CODE NOT IN ('9', 'C', 'COMPLETE', 'CANCEL') GROUP BY t.TASK_TYPE, t.STAT_CODE ORDER BY TASK_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Task detail with item, location, and assigned user
sqlTemplate: SELECT t.TASK_ID, t.TASK_TYPE, t.STAT_CODE, d.ITEM_ID, b.ITEM_NAME, lf.LOCN_BRCD AS FROM_LOCN, lt.LOCN_BRCD AS TO_LOCN, t.ASGN_USR_ID, t.LAST_UPDATED_DTTM FROM {schema}.TASK t JOIN {schema}.TASK_DTL d ON d.TASK_ID = t.TASK_ID JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = d.ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR lf ON lf.LOCN_ID = d.FROM_LOCN_ID LEFT JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR lt ON lt.LOCN_ID = d.TO_LOCN_ID WHERE t.STAT_CODE NOT IN ('9', 'C', 'COMPLETE', 'CANCEL') AND t.LAST_UPDATED_DTTM >= {time_rhs} ORDER BY t.LAST_UPDATED_DTTM DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Stock quantity at pick locations
sqlTemplate: SELECT l.LOCN_BRCD, b.ITEM_NAME, p.ITEM_ID, p.ON_HAND_QTY, p.QTY_TO_BE_PICKED, p.LAST_UPDATED_DTTM FROM {schema}.PICK_LOCN_DTL p JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = p.ITEM_ID JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR l ON l.LOCN_ID = p.LOCN_ID WHERE p.ON_HAND_QTY > 0 ORDER BY p.ON_HAND_QTY DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Open allocations with item and location
sqlTemplate: SELECT a.ITEM_ID, b.ITEM_NAME, l.LOCN_BRCD, a.QTY_ALLOC, a.CREATE_DATE_TIME FROM {schema}.ALLOC_INVN_DTL a JOIN {schema}.ITEM_CBO b ON b.ITEM_ID = a.ITEM_ID JOIN {schema}.LOCN_HDR l ON l.LOCN_ID = a.LOCN_ID ORDER BY a.CREATE_DATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Summary of all transaction types in a time window
sqlTemplate: SELECT t.TRAN_CODE, COUNT(*) AS TRAN_COUNT, SUM(t.QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY, MAX(t.TRAN_DATE) AS LAST_TRAN_TIME FROM {schema}.PIX_TRAN t WHERE t.TRAN_DATE >= {time_rhs} GROUP BY t.TRAN_CODE ORDER BY TRAN_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Location status with zone and current inventory
sqlTemplate: SELECT l.LOCN_BRCD, l.LOCN_CLASS, l.AISLE, l.BAY, l.LEVEL_NBR AS LOC_LEVEL, l.POSITION, NVL(i.ON_HAND_QTY, 0) AS ON_HAND_QTY FROM {schema}.LOCN_HDR l LEFT JOIN {schema}.WM_INVENTORY i ON i.LOCN_ID = l.LOCN_ID WHERE l.LOCN_BRCD LIKE '%{input}%' ORDER BY l.LOCN_BRCD FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

intent: Translate task type codes to business descriptions

intent: Translate location class codes to descriptions

intent: Test domain code entry
Find the shipment or load with the most units for a specific DC
keywords: which load is shipping the most units
which shipment is shipping the most units
open load shipping the most units
sqlTemplate: SELECT sh.shipment_id, sh.tc_shipment_id, sh.shipment_status, SUM(oli.order_qty) AS total_units FROM {schema}.shipment sh JOIN {schema}.orders ord ON sh.tc_shipment_id = ord.tc_shipment_id JOIN {schema}.order_line_item oli ON ord.order_id = oli.order_id WHERE sh.shipment_status < 80 GROUP BY sh.shipment_id, sh.tc_shipment_id, sh.shipment_status ORDER BY SUM(oli.order_qty) DESC

intent: Get schema name for a given DC
sqlTemplate: SELECT w.schema_nm FROM manh.dv1x_dc_schema_xref w WHERE w.dc_id = :i_dc_id

intent: Get DC ID for a given schema name
sqlTemplate: SELECT w.dc_id FROM manh.dv1x_dc_schema_xref w WHERE w.schema_nm = :i_schema_name

intent: Delete duplicate RT lock records
sqlTemplate: delete from {schema}.lpn_lock where rowid not in (select min(rowid) from {schema}.lpn_lock group by lpn_id, inventory_lock_code)

intent: Update Door Reference Information
Update Shipment in Door Reference
Update Stop in Shipment
Purge archives
sqlTemplate: SELECT purge_config_id FROM purge_config

intent: Update Accessorials
Insert Log Entry
sqlTemplate: INSERT INTO app_log VALUES (:1)

intent: Trim Log Table
sqlTemplate: DELETE FROM app_log WHERE log_ts < :1 AND ROWNUM <= 500000

intent: Delete duplicate rows in lpn_lock table
sqlTemplate: DELETE FROM {schema_nm}.lpn_lock WHERE rowid NOT IN (SELECT MIN(rowid) FROM {schema_nm}.lpn_lock GROUP BY lpn_id, inventory_lock_code)

intent: Count dock_door_master records by actvty_type
sqlTemplate: SELECT ACTVTY_TYPE, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM {schema}.DOCK_DOOR_MASTER GROUP BY ACTVTY_TYPE ORDER BY cnt DESC

intent: Show recent dock_door_master records by create_date_time
sqlTemplate: SELECT CURR_SHPMT_NBR FROM {schema}.DOCK_DOOR_MASTER ORDER BY CREATE_DATE_TIME DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

intent: Analyze dock_door_master trends by date and actvty_type
sqlTemplate: SELECT TRUNC({date_col}) as day, ACTVTY_TYPE, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM {schema}.DOCK_DOOR_MASTER WHERE CREATE_DATE_TIME >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)-30 GROUP BY TRUNC(CREATE_DATE_TIME), ACTVTY_TYPE ORDER BY day DESC
